description: Create, void, and refund transactions using Braintree server SDK

required_fields.paymentMethodNonce: Single-use nonce from Drop-in UI or Hosted Fields

optional_fields.paymentMethodToken: Vault token — use instead of nonce for returning customers
optional_fields.customerId: Braintree customer ID for vaulted payments
optional_fields.options.submitForSettlement: true to capture immediately, false to authorize only
optional_fields.options.storeInVaultOnSuccess: true to vault the payment method
optional_fields.deviceData: Fraud device data from client SDK

transaction_statuses.gateway_rejected: Rejected by Braintree fraud tools or AVS/CVV rules

void.note: Cannot void after settling — use refund instead

refund.partial_refund: Pass amount for partial refund; omit for full refund
refund.note: Multiple partial refunds allowed up to original amount

submit_for_settlement.partial_capture: Pass amount less than authorized for partial capture

best_practices: Always set options.submitForSettlement = true for immediate capture
Use options.storeInVaultOnSuccess for one-click future payments
Include deviceData from client for fraud detection
Log transaction.id for all operations (disputes, refunds)
